prompt: Two images are provided. IMAGE 1 is a scene: a woman in a Milos setting wearing a navy-and-white pinstripe tiered maxi dress. IMAGE 2 is the portrait of the SPECIFIC PERSON whose face must appear in the final result. COMPLETELY REPLACE the entire head and face of the woman in IMAGE 1 with the woman from IMAGE 2. The final face must clearly and unmistakably be the IMAGE 2 woman and must NOT resemble the original IMAGE 1 woman at all. Reproduce IMAGE 2's identity precisely: her fuller, slightly rounder face shape, warm golden-olive skin with light freckles across nose and cheeks, full lips, strong defined dark eyebrows, warm brown eyes, and her long warm dark-brown SOFTLY WAVED hair (replace straight hair with these soft waves; keep the hair a believable warm dark brown, not caramel-blonde). Keep everything else from IMAGE 1 identical: pose, the navy pinstripe dress and every stripe/gather/tier/hem, body, hands, sandals, the setting, and the warm late-afternoon light and all shadows. ONLY the head and facial identity change. Photorealistic; light the new face with the same warm side light as the scene.
